Balance Transfer

  • Lower EMI with Balance Transfer

    • Transfer your existing loan balance to HDFC Bank for a reduced EMI.
  • Competitive Interest Rates

    • Transfer loans with interest rates starting at 9.99%* p.a.

Wondering if you are eligible?

You can apply for a Personal Loan, if you meet the following criteria:

  • Age: 21 to 60 years
  • Employment: 
    • - Employees of Private, Limited and LLP Companies
    • - Employees of public sector undertakings (central, state, and local bodies)
  • Work Experience: Minimum of 2 years of total work experience, with at least 1 year in the current organisation.
  • Income: Minimum monthly net income of ₹25,000.

Know more about Personal Loan Eligibility

More about Personal Loan

Personal Loan from HDFC Bank offer several key features

Personal Accident Cover

For a nominal premium* you can avail of Personal Accident cover of up to ₹ 8 lakhs, and Critical Illness cover of up to ₹ 1 lakh. The premium for these policies will be deducted from the loan amount during disbursal. Applicable taxes and surcharge/cess will be charged extra.

Read More

Personal Loan Security

Secure your personal loan with Sarv Suraksha Pro. Key benefits include:
Credit Shield Cover equal to the outstanding loan amount
Accidental Hospitalisation cover of up to ₹ 8 Lakhs*
Accidental Death/Permanent Disablement cover of up to ₹ 1 Lakh*
*Terms and conditions of the insurers shall apply. The policy is offered by HDFC Ergo GIC Ltd.

Read More

Do’s Don’ts
Plan your EMIs wisely: Ensure the monthly installment fits comfortably within your budget without affecting essential expenses. Don’t miss payments: Late or missed EMIs can attract penalties and may impact your credit score.
Inform your lender early: If you anticipate repayment challenges, contact HDFC Bank promptly to explore possible solutions. Don’t apply for multiple loans simultaneously: Multiple applications in a short period can lower your credit score.
Keep loan records secure: Store your loan agreement, repayment schedule, and bank communications for future reference. Don’t use funds for high‑risk purposes:  Avoid speculative or risky investments that can strain your repayment ability.
Enable timely payments: Set up auto‑debit/standing instructions and reminders to avoid delays.                   Don’t add liabilities during repayment: Refrain from co‑signing or guaranteeing other borrowings that increase financial risk.

  1. Build a small contingency cushion:
    Set aside a portion of the loan amount as a backup to manage unforeseen expenses.

  2. Reassess your financial plan:
    After taking a loan, review your goals and monthly commitments to ensure they remain achievable.

  3. Avoid taking on additional liabilities:
    While repaying your loan, avoid co‑signing or guaranteeing other borrowings that may increase your financial risk.

     

Lower your Personal Loan EMI by doing a balance transfer to HDFC Bank - Personal Loan Balance Transfer

Frequently Asked Questions  

A Personal Loan is an unsecured loan that you can use for all your personal needs like Travel, Weddings, Healthcare or any medical emergencies. You can repay the funds via fixed monthly instalments.  

As Personal Loan is an unsecured loan, you need not pledge any collateral such as property or gold to avail Personal Loan. 

To avail HDFC Bank Personal Loan, all you need to do is to apply for Personal Loan on https://applyonline.hdfcbank.com/personal-loans.html and Click Submit. On meeting the eligibility criteria, you will get an offer with the sanctioned amount, tenure of loan and interest rate. Once you accept the offer, funds are transferred to your bank account instantly. 

Personal Loan can be availed up to ₹50,00,000. * However, basis the loan requirement, you can avail up to ₹75,00,000 subject to eligibility norms. 

For availing Personal Loan, you need to meet the mentioned basic criteria:

  • Age: 21 to 60 years

  • Employment:  

  • Employees of private limited companies

  • Employees of public sector undertakings (central, state, and local bodies) 

  • Work Experience: Minimum of 2 years of total work experience, with at least 1 year in the current organisation

  • Income: Minimum monthly net income of ₹25,000 

Interest on Personal Loan depends on various factors such as CIBIL score, Repayment History, Principal amount, Tenure. Use the Personal Loan EMI calculator link.     

Under the Golden Edge program, we offer, upon the payment of a minimum 12 EMIs, the Customer shall have the option to foreclose the loan in full or part towards the outstanding principal amount of the loan without any prepayment charge if the loan is prepaid from own sources. ​The customer who is having an income >= ₹75,000, and loan amount >₹15 Lakh is eligible for this offer.

Fast, easy, secure—start your XPRESS personal loan application right now
